inputs.fcf_source: Mid-cycle operating income proxy $2040.5M ÷ 658.621M shares; FY2025 OCF $3099.0M and capex $3779.0M per AAL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0000006201_26_000014.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 GAAP net income $111M reflects trough operating income and heavy non-cash items; Lawrence base uses mid-cycle operating income and OCF per share, not peak 2023 heroics.

bear.notes: Recession, fare compression, fuel spike; debt wall limits equity recovery

base.notes: Mid-cycle demand normalization; modest deleveraging from OCF; exit 7× owner cash

bull.notes: Sustained premium cabin mix and loyalty monetization; faster debt paydown

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Fleet and route network carried at depreciated cost; AAdvantage intangible not separately capitalized on balance sheet

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating airline; no royalty or land-at-zero pattern

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: AAdvantage co-brand and partner mile sales; modeled in aadvantage_co_brand_option component

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes disclosed (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No special dividend or litigation recovery catalyst

growth_explanation.mechanism: Passenger revenue scales with available seat miles and yield; corporate travel and premium cabin mix drive unit revenue; loyalty program monetization adds high-margin co-brand cash.

falsifiers.trigger: TRASM falls more than 5% YoY for two consecutive quarters without offsetting cost cuts
Total debt rises above $30B while operating income stays below $2B for four quarters

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map the passenger network, loyalty co-brand option, net financial claims, and cycle/leverage reserve once each.

components.label: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AAL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0000006201_26_000014.htm: FY2025 revenue $54633.0M, OCF $3099.0M, cash $902.0M, total debt $29007.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AAL, including mid-cycle network operations, AAdvantage co-brand optionality, net financial claims, and cycle/leverage reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating network cash is valued once; cash, debt, co-brand option, and cycle reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for levered airline.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Co-brand and partner mile contracts renew over 3 to 7 years; base case assumes continued monetization through FY2030.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Partner-funded mile sales require no incremental owner capital in base case.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_groups.label: AAdvantage co-brand and partner loyalty economics
component_groups.economic_claim: AAdvantage co-brand and partner loyalty economics
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Co-brand and partner mile contracts renew over 3 to 7 years; base case assumes continued monetization through FY2030.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from industry loyalty precedents; American does not disclose standalone AAdvantage segment economics in SEC filings.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Partner-funded mile sales require no incremental owner capital in base case.

limitations: AAdvantage standalone value is judgment-based pending issuer disclosure.
Levered equity stub; component sum can be negative while market prices recovery.

pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
pricing_analysis.implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 7x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
falsifiers: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
pricing_analysis.pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (Predictable cash-flow security). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AAL, including mid-cycle network operations, AAdvantage co-brand optionality, net financial claims, and cycle/leverage reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating network cash is valued once; cash, debt, co-brand option, and cycle reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from AAL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0000006201_26_000014.htm: FY2025 revenue $54633.0M, OCF $3099.0M, cash $902.0M, total debt $29007.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
